question: Does a fixed public compressed-v bit mutation reveal a parameter-set-specific or statistically exceptional structure through poly_decompress -> NTT?
primary_metric: 16-bin Z_q entropy deficit of NTT field differences
nulls: independent row re-pairing of exact mutated output multiset
same-size row-wise random one-bit mutation controls
decision_rule: A candidate requires exact two-sided p <= 0.01 across five seeds and a parameter-set-specific excess beyond same-type random mutations.
